description: Master index file. Contains the magic header, version info, and per-pack MD5 checksums. Parsed once to discover how many pack files (tasks.dataN) exist and to validate their integrity.

fields.name: magic
fields.description: Magic number identifying this as a ZX task index. Expected value verified by TaskDataReader.

fields.name: version
fields.description: Format version of the binary data. Version 165 is the target for this struct set.

fields.name: export_version
fields.description: Export/tool version used when generating the file.

fields.name: item_count
fields.description: Total number of top-level task records across all packs.

fields.name: md5_array
fields.description: One 16-byte MD5 checksum per pack file, in pack order. struct task_md5 { uint8_t data[16]; }.
